reviews_list.review_title: It's a very good college, student and teacher interaction is good.

review_content.Placements: It's MBBS everyone gets a job after they pass out and serve as a doctor. After 4 years, there is one year of internship in hospital which has to be served by every student. After that students are eligible for giving PG entrance examination.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are top-notch in the college. There is free Wi-fi in library. There are 4 lecture theatres with LED projectors and AC. All labs are well-equipped. Facilities of hostel are also very good. The food available is also of good quality.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely best college.

review_content.Placements: Actually this is a new college which was opened in 2022 and I am the student of the first batch but I can bet we will be getting PG in a very good college as we have very good teachers and all the facilities which a medico needs. We are also excited for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome starting from the academic block, cafeteria, library, classrooms, hostels and everything. We have 3 canteens and 4 mess facilities. We also have a wonderful sports complex including badminton court, basketball court. We also have a football and cricket ground.

admission_process.title: Kuvempu University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Kuvempu University admissions are merit and entrance-based. Karnataka PGCET, UGC NET, GATE, etc. are also accepted for admission to certain courses by the university. Kuvempu University also organizes an entrance exam for MBA, BPEd, MPEd and MCA. PG, PhD and PG diploma courses are offered by the university in full-time and part-time modes. The university also contains a Directorate of Distance Education that provides UG, PG and PhD courses in various streams. Candidates who are interested can apply online from the official website of Kuvempu University.
Check out more details in the below video:

Kuvempu University courses are available in multiple streams. Candidates who have completed a minimum of Class 12 can apply for UG courses. However, graduation is required for PG courses. Applications are likely to open inMayfor all courses. Below are eligibility and selection criteria for topKuvempu University courses:

Kuvempu University feeincludes tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. There is relaxation in the fee amount for SC/ ST candidates. Under the Payment Category students, KU students have slightly lower fee than other university students.

After the completion of admission process, request for refund of fees shall not be considered under any circumstances. In respect of MBA and MCA courses, the refund of any excess fees paid by the students would be made only after the receipt of excess fees from the concerned authority. Check below Kuvempu University fee for popular courses:

Kuvempu University seats are offered under Merit-cum-Reservation and Merit Special Categories. Candidates are offered seat in the university based on their merit or entrance exam score. Below is total seat intake for popular courses of KU:
There is relaxation in the seats for reserved category students as mentioned below:

The Kuvempu University admission begins with registration. To attend the selection rounds, the candidates have to submit an application to the course of their preference. The following are the step-by-step admission details of the Kuvempu University:
STEP 1: Kuvempu University 2025 Application Process.

The eligible candidates would be able to apply online on the official site of the university. The applicant will be able to apply via UUCMS Portal with a fee of INR 300 (INR 150 in case of SC/ ST/ CAT-I). Students applying to join MBA, MCA, BPEd and MPEd programs must remit the extra fee on entrance test in Challan in SBI jnanasahyadri. PhD application fee is INR 1,000 (INR 750 in case of SC/ ST/ CAT-I).
STEP 2: Selection

Most of the courses offered in Kuvempu University are selected on the basis of merit in the final qualification exam. Applicants are required to take the university entrance exam of the MPEd, BPEd, MBA and MCA. MBA is also offered at the university on Karnataka PGCET score. In addition to that, PhD is subject to admission based on either UGC NET, GATE or KU Entrance Exam score.
STEP 3: Confirmation of Admission.

After the release of the entrance exam results, the university publishes a list of shortlisted candidates by publishing a list that gives the name of the selected people. The shortlisted applicants will then be expected to pay the course fee and confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: Kuvempu University offers BPEd through the School of Education for two-years. The university selects candidates for BPEd based on the entrance exam conducted by KU. Candidates who have passed graduation with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Category - I, Sports and Persons with Disability and 35% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for BPEd programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BPEd at Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete graduation with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for Category - I, Sports and Persons with Disability and 35% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Kuvempu University BPEd course. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification. Besides, the selection for BPEd will be based on entrance exam conducted by the university.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BPEd at Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: Kuvempu University selects candidates for BPEd based on entrance exam conducted by the university. There shall be an entrance test for admission to BPEd conducted by the university. The details of syllabi and pattern of entrance test are given in the respective Department Profile. The admission notification for BPEd releases in October. After completion of the selection process, the university releases a merit list to announce the name of selected candidates.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for BPEd at Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Kuvempu University BPEd ranges betweenINR 33,000 and INR 83,800.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Once selected, students will also need to pay tuition fee semester-wise. Besides, there is an application fee that aspirants pay in the start to register for a course.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: Kuvempu University conducts entrance exam for MBA, MCA, BPEd and MPEd. Admissions for MCA and MBA courses are made through PGCET conducted by KEA, Bengaluru. However, a separate Entrance Test will be conducted by Kuvempu University to fill up unfilled seats. There shall be an entrance test for admission to M.P.Ed and B.P.Ed conducted by the University. The details of syllabi and pattern of entrance test are given in the respective Department Profile.

faqs.question: Can I direct admission to Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: There is no such provision for direct admission to any of the programmes at Kuvempu University. The university course admissions are both merit and entrance-exam-based. For MBA and MCA, the university fills the unfilled seats through university entrance exam. KU also conducts an entrance test for admission to BPEd and MPEd courses. Once the selection is over, Kuvempu University releases a selection list to announce the names of selected candidates.

faqs.question: When does the admission season of Kuvempu University commence?
faqs.answer: The admission season of Kuvempu University usually commences in June-July with the availability of university online prospectus, followed by the opening of registration window. For some of the courses, the university begins registration in April. Admission to most of the courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates have to appear for an entrance exam for admission to MBA, MCA, BPEd and MPEd.

faqs.question: What is the selection procedure to get into B.Ed course of Kuvempu University?
faqs.answer: Kuvempu University select candidates for admission on a merit-basis. The applicants performance in the UG degree course is evaluated for selection. Candidates academic background may also be considered. Hence, it is necessary that the aspirants meet the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission.

hostel.description: The University has four hostels for the post-graduate students on the main campus - two men’s hostels and two women’s hostels. Besides, there is a working women’s hostel on the campus providing accommodation to students and research scholars. Students are advised to apply for hostels immediately after admission (on the same day).

review_content.General: The college provides spacious classrooms and different labs for different branches. Labs are- OS Lab, DBMS, CA, etc. Wi-Fi is available for the students and staff. individual_reviews.title: Supportive faculty members but poor management and declining infrastructure ruined the experience.

content.Placements: Placements are poor for BCA. Hardly 10-15 percent of students get placed, mostly via pool drives. Average package is 2 LPA to 3 LPA. There are no official internships. There is no proper placement cell. Companies like TCS and Wipro visit occasionally, but few get selected. Roles offered are basic support or BPO type.
content.Infrastructure: As a BCA student, I found the infrastructure below average. Labs have outdated systems, and classrooms are congested. Wi-Fi rarely works. The only good part is the library. It is peaceful and helpful. There is no hostel, so I stayed in a nearby PG. The canteen lacks hygiene, and food quality is poor. There is no medical facility on campus. The playground is very small, not suitable for regular sports. But the college organizes sports events, which I enjoyed. Overall, the campus feels cramped and lacks basic facilities which affects the college experience for many of us.

Eligibility
CIEM Kolkata admission process includes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in CIEM Kolkata:
STEP 1: CIEM Kolkata Application Process 2024

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students who are looking for admission to Calcutta Institute of Engineering and Management need to meet the last educational qualification set by the institute.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

CIEM Kolkata shortlists candidates based on merit. However, for BTech courses, students will be selected based on WBJEE, JEE Main, CBSE 12, ICSE, and WBCHSE scores. For MBA score, selection would based on MAT, CAT, CMAT, and JEMAT.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seat in the institute. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

library.description: The library of C.I.E.M. is one of its kinds in the city which spans over a huge carpet area, as large as 545 sq. m and boasts of its huge number and variety of titles in the racks. A count of books which goes well above 15 thousand, the library provides a complete and comprehensive resource to quench the thirst of knowledge of the students. About three thousand titles are there in the racks, which are constantly being updated, and maintained up-to-date with professional precision. New titles are constantly added on, which means each time you visit; there is more to know than before. The library also maintains about 28 journals, which helps the budding engineers to get them acquainted with the present situations in technology, literature, sports and politics. As handling of such huge resources is by no means easy manually, C.I.E.M. library is moving towards automation and the progress is steady. The library is well equipped with the college edition of the LIBSYS software, computerized circulation system, OPAC, Internet Facility and Library networking facility which makes the process of issue smooth and supple.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CIEM - Calcutta Institute Of Engineering & Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have 3 buildings, one for engineering, one for management courses, and one for MBA, and one is in the making. The college has a library too. The college is surrounded by greenery all over. The college doesn't provide hostel services.

reviews.review_heading: Best placements were given by our college in Kolkata in the last 5 years.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all the classes are totally smart with educomp projectors. Jio provides Wi-Fi across the campus. The labs are well maintained and the  library has a huge collection of books but the librarian was a little rude. No hostels are present in the college campus but many PG are available in Tollygunge. The canteen food was our love and a playground is available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good except the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent having a huge playground, classrooms and labs which are good. Moreover, the infrastructure is good. The labs are fully AC with the systems upgrading. It has a central library where one can only take books related to the curriculum and not on other topics.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very popular college in West Bengal having a good location.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a very good service of labs and library. Infrastructure is not too good but it is sufficient. The classrooms and Wi-Fi facilities are not too good. Quality of food available is good in the mess and the canteen of college, but there is no hostel available in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text:
The labs and library are good, but there is no Wi-Fi, there are no air conditioners in the classrooms, and the heat waves are really devastating.
Canteen food is super unhealthy & low-maintenance. Sports and games are good, but sometimes the students have to contribute on their own for the sports tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for study purposes, faculty members, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide hostel facilities. Canteen is very good. Sports are conducted. All seniors are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best college in Calcutta .
reviews.review_text: Yes, all these facilities are available in our campus. Wi-fi, labs, AC classrooms and good quality food are available in our hostel and canteen. Sports ground for volleyball, football, cricket are available. Curriculum activities are arranged every year like annual sports.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with infrastructure and faculty members of our college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in our college are good. Every book is available in the library and a book bank is provided to issue the books for the whole semester. Labs are air-conditioned and well-maintained. Wi-Fi facilities are available. All types of games are played in our college on a very good field.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements for CSE and IT students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but hostels are not provided. Wi-Fi is always available. Labs and the library provided by the institute are in very good condition. There are two canteens. The food is very delicious and healthy.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, but there are no fests, which is somewhat disappointing.

content.Placements: Pharma D (Doctor of Pharmacy) students have hospital visits through which they can later work in hospitals with that experience. They also have internships in the final year, and B. Pharmacy is linked with companies where they get placements, like Reddy's Lab, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has classrooms equipped with power point presentations and a library where every book is available, allowing students to easily refer to their classes. There are labs to improve practical knowledge. Regarding the hostel, the infrastructure and facilities are quite good; I would give a rating of 3/5 for the mess and canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with exams.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placements. The highest salary package offered is 9 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very old. It was constructed 33 years ago. A girls' hostel is available on campus. Boys' hostels are available.
content.Faculty: All lecturers have their strengths, and some lecturers can't explain properly due to a lack of English knowledge. They can't afford quality education, but some lecturers can teach excellently compared to other lecturers.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with the faculty and good placements are offered.

content.Placements: B.Pharma and pharma are the best offered courses. The top companies are reddys labs, aruonindo, sunpharma, bluecross, alembica, etc. Most of the students are placed with good jobs . Top roles offered are investigators, coders, clinical research, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and Wi-Fi enabled classes, good library with lots of books and better knowledge is provided. The facilities are better provided by the management with a good ambience. A canteen for food items is provided.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best.

content.Placements: We are not having any placements right now but am sure that we would get placements in the future. Our college is now approved by NAAAC with A grade. So in the future, we are expecting to get placements. For this we need to get good percentages and has to get skilled.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are always neat and clean. We can find every book we needed in the library. And the food they give in the hostel is so healthy. Labs consists of all the chemicals which are required to perform experiments. Facilities in the hostel are good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college and good studies.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is minimum 100 members. The average packages of our course is 6L/12 L per annum. Many of the companies like gold lite, Wipro, pharma companies. There is no internship in our course. But students try their level best to get jobs in placements.
content.Infrastructure: There is no facilities like Wi-Fi and good equipment in labs but classrooms are good. The canteen is very dirty and mess also not at all good. Games are good. Many people are playing games in our college many of the students of different college are playing in our college.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech and Hearing Disabilities Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.answer: A:    Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech and Hearing Disabilities is a good institution for Certificate, M.Sc, M.A, PG Diploma, UG Diploma, B.Ed, M.Ed, B.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech and Hearing Disabilities are Media Planning, Audiology & Speech Therapy.
faqs.question: What specializations do Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech and Hearing Disabilities offer in their courses?

reviews_list.review_title: Perfect place for gaining knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Since it's a medical field. Almost all students are placed the same year they pass out. The highest package you receive is 1-2lacs, the lowest- 20k. One can even start their own clinic and earn 5k per day. Cochlear, neurelec, Advance bionics, - top recruiting companies. In cochlear company, Audiologist, hearing aid fitting, Cochlear implant counselor, auditory verbal therapy (AVT), Pre and post implant rehabilitation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Perfect hostel to stay in. Except u'll be getting different taste eating in canteen ( Maharashtra food), Hospital is just nearby- Bhabha hospital (1km) and holy family hospital (700m), sports available are- volleyball, badminton, cricket. Library is a perfect one. Classrooms are though small. U get unlimited Wi-Fi but only during Library hours.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech - Language Pathology 3 - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college to be in if you want to be an audiologist.

review_content.Placements: The stipend being offered is Rs. 6000 per month in the final year. The placements happen on campus during the end of the final year. The average salary provided is Rs. 28,000. Almost everyone gets placed around 80%. Various clinical heads and companies come in for the job placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is available for everyone. There are well-equipped labs of computer and audiometric evaluation machines. Specified rooms for speech therapy are also there. The classrooms are with good quality seating arrangements. The library has a lot of books regarding all subjects. The infrastructure is good. The food offered at the canteen is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech - Language Pathology - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Apart from all the problems, the college helped me pave my career. A good and green campus

review_content.Placements: They were okay. Only 1 hearing aid company came and 2-3 students got placed. Audiologist in one centre in Mumbai. Everyone got internships. Rs 6000 was the stipend per month offered to everyone. It is mandatory to take the internship outside. But we were not given outside, we were given in the college itself, so less exposure towards different cases because we get only childhood language disorders more in our college and very less neuro cases, so it has affected our knowledge towards the field.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are given with good quality. The food in the canteen is okay and even choices are limited. Hostel rooms are okay for the price taken. Projectors are always not working and Wi-Fi was provided only in the library. The library is well-stocked, maintained and is the only good part about the college. Sports and games are hardly there with no college fest present and no convocation ceremony given to us.

content.Infrastructure: It has a good infrastructure. It has a special school for special kids as well. We have an excellent library with good Wi-Fi services. It gives rich access to online journals, and these are updated regularly. We have good classrooms. The gym and sports are average. It can be improved. We have good medical facilities. They provide good quality food in the canteen. The hostel conditions are average. This can be improved.
content.Faculty: We have qualified teachers. They are knowledgeable with average teaching quality. We have a relevant course curriculum that makes students ready for the outside world. Clinical practicals can be improved. Semester exams are easy. The pass percentage is 80% to 90%.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech - Language Pathology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Perfect place for gaining knowledge.

content.Placements: Since it's a medical field. Almost all students are placed the same year they pass out. The highest package you receive is 1-2lacs, the lowest- 20k. One can even start their own clinic and earn 5k per day. Cochlear, neurelec, Advance bionics, - top recruiting companies. In cochlear company, Audiologist, hearing aid fitting, Cochlear implant counselor, auditory verbal therapy (AVT), Pre and post implant rehabilitation.
content.Infrastructure: Perfect hostel to stay in. Except u'll be getting different taste eating in canteen ( Maharashtra food), Hospital is just nearby- Bhabha hospital (1km) and holy family hospital (700m), sports available are- volleyball, badminton, cricket. Library is a perfect one. Classrooms are though small. U get unlimited Wi-Fi but only during Library hours.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech - Language Pathology 3 - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college to be in if you want to be an audiologist.

content.Placements: The stipend being offered is Rs. 6000 per month in the final year. The placements happen on campus during the end of the final year. The average salary provided is Rs. 28,000. Almost everyone gets placed around 80%. Various clinical heads and companies come in for the job placements.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is available for everyone. There are well-equipped labs of computer and audiometric evaluation machines. Specified rooms for speech therapy are also there. The classrooms are with good quality seating arrangements. The library has a lot of books regarding all subjects. The infrastructure is good. The food offered at the canteen is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Audiology and Speech - Language Pathology - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Apart from all the problems, the college helped me pave my career. A good and green campus

content.Placements: They were okay. Only 1 hearing aid company came and 2-3 students got placed. Audiologist in one centre in Mumbai. Everyone got internships. Rs 6000 was the stipend per month offered to everyone. It is mandatory to take the internship outside. But we were not given outside, we were given in the college itself, so less exposure towards different cases because we get only childhood language disorders more in our college and very less neuro cases, so it has affected our knowledge towards the field.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are given with good quality. The food in the canteen is okay and even choices are limited. Hostel rooms are okay for the price taken. Projectors are always not working and Wi-Fi was provided only in the library. The library is well-stocked, maintained and is the only good part about the college. Sports and games are hardly there with no college fest present and no convocation ceremony given to us.
